global.description: The ad features a vibrant pink background with a central product display and clear promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a new collection with a limited-time offer.

elements.label: Pink background
elements.description: A vibrant pink background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: A stylized representation of two mirrors or reflective surfaces, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A bold, white text stating 'New collection drop' positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Weekend offer
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline that reads 'Only this weekend'.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A prominent white text displaying the price '€29.99' located below the body text.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A bright yellow button with the text 'Book now' that stands out against the pink background.

elements.label: User-generated content
elements.description: A small circular badge labeled 'UGC' positioned at the top left corner.
elements.text_content: New collection drop Only this weekend €29.99 Book now

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The brand name 'VantaStyle' displayed in a bold font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Sale indicator
elements.description: A small, circular badge with the word 'SALE' in bold text at the top right corner.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A simple circular icon that adds a decorative touch, located near the product display.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the product display is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
